creator: huntting@glarp.com
text:
Alas, I dont have freebsd box I can test this on at the moment.  If you need
me to approve something, let me know what and how.

thanks,
brad

On Mon, Jul 18, 2011 at 10:08, Eygene Ryabinkin <rea@freebsd.org> wrote:

> The following patch should fix the original issue and eliminate
> the error about fflush():
>  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/fcron/3.0.6-fix-mode_t-in-varargs.diff
>
> Tinderbox builds are OK,
>  - http://gpf.codelabs.ru/tb-logs/mine-9/fcron-3.0.6_1.log
>  - http://gpf.codelabs.ru/tb-logs/mine-8/fcron-3.0.6_1.log
>  - http://gpf.codelabs.ru/tb-logs/mine-7/fcron-3.0.6_1.log
> and my limited testing of the fcron revealed no issues.
>
> Chris, if you're still using fcron, can you, please, test
> the above patch and report back?
>
> Thanks!
